rulings.Case Title: SHARON WOODY et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION And Notice Of Motion To Compel Discovery Responses From Plaintiff Edward Woody And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, May 24, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Frontier Building Supply Co.¿s motion to compel discovery responses from plaintiff Edward Woody and request for sanctions is granted. No opposition filed. Hearing required unless defense counsel contacts plaintiffs and plaintiffs say that they do not wish to contest the tentative ruling. = (220/HEK)
